standaloneMode: Standalone mode: dashboard is available without Supabase auth.
supabaseMissing: Supabase is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to enable authentication; dashboard modules remain available.
promptPanelDescription: Launch use-case prompts, templates, packs, deployment, governance, analytics, and marketplace flows.
usecasesDescription: Browse UABP-enabled use cases, templates, packs, deployment, governance, analytics, and marketplace modules.
buildpacksDescription: Detect, compile, deploy, publish, and install Unified Agentic Build Packs.
settingsDescription: Adjust language, holographic intensity, particle density, logo animation, and palette mode.
